naturalMeaning: All-purpose greeting for hello and goodbye; add ครับ/ค่ะ to be polite.

naturalMeaning: The standard 'thank you'; soften with ครับ/ค่ะ.

naturalMeaning: Used both to apologize and to get someone's attention.
Confirms that something is so; the natural 'yes, that's right'.
The core negator placed before verbs and adjectives.
A more formal farewell than just สวัสดี.
Expresses being pleased, as in 'nice to meet you'.

naturalMeaning: Polite way to request something: ขอ + the thing.

naturalMeaning: Sentence-final politeness particle used by male speakers.

examples.text: สวัสดีครับ

Female speakers use high-tone คะ at the end of questions.
Softens a sentence, making it gentler or more persuasive.
Polite first-person pronoun used by male speakers.

Points to something near the listener or away: 'that one'.

Good; one of the most common adjectives.
